title: Aurora Landing Screen — Voice Input Bug
description: On the landing screen, Aurora glows gold when listening but shows no visual feedback for an incoming query and never dispatches it.
notes: Orb glow triggers correctly — mic activation works
Query text does not appear / interim transcript not surfacing to UI
Final transcript never sent — investigate submit path from landing screen vs. main chat

title: Intel Tool — Audio Alert Bug Fix
description: Audio alerts do not fire when intel is reported within 5 jumps in live use, despite working correctly in isolated tests.
notes: Works in test environment — likely a timing or state-sync issue in production flow
Investigate alert trigger path when intel arrives through the live parser

title: Persistent ESI Sessions
description: Keep characters logged in across app restarts by persisting and auto-refreshing ESI refresh tokens.
notes: Store refresh token securely (electron-store / keychain, not localStorage)
Silent re-auth on launch using refresh token before expiry
Surface re-login prompt only when refresh token is revoked or expired

title: Multi-Account ESI Login
description: Support adding and switching between multiple EVE characters/accounts, each with their own ESI auth token.
notes: Store tokens per character — keyed by character ID
Account switcher UI in header or sidebar
Scope sets may differ per character — handle gracefully

title: Auto-Detect Player Location
description: Automatically pull the pilot's current system from ESI so the Intel tool can calculate jump range without manual input.
notes: ESI scope: esi-location.read_location.v1
Poll or use a refresh trigger to keep location current

title: RIFT Intel Integration
description: Pull live intel data from RIFT into Aurora — hostile activity, system status, and threat assessments visible alongside other panels.
notes: Requires RIFT API key / feed configuration
Display in dedicated Intel panel or overlay on existing views

title: Aurora's Voice — ElevenLabs Integration
description: Give Aurora a voice using ElevenLabs TTS. Select a voice that fits Aurora's character, wire it into alert and notification events.
notes: Audition ElevenLabs voice library — open to suggestions for best fit
Start with Intel alerts, expand to other spoken notifications
ElevenLabs API key required; consider streaming vs. pre-generated clips

title: Aurora × Claude Code — Self-Modifying Agent
description: Explore giving Aurora access to her own codebase via the Claude Code SDK so she can read, reason about, and potentially modify herself.
notes: Claude Code SDK / agent loop would need to be embedded or sidecar'd
Significant safety and scope concerns — sandboxing required
Likely a research spike first: can Aurora answer "how do you work?" accurately?
Probably unlikely in full form — log as aspirational / long-term exploration

title: Wallet & Transaction History
description: Full wallet journal and transaction history pulled from ESI. Filter by type, date range, and counterparty.
notes: ESI scopes: esi-wallet.read_character_wallet.v1
Chart ISK flow over time
Export to CSV

title: Alliance Freight Calculator
description: Calculate freight costs for alliance logistics routes. Input items/volume, select route, get collateral and cost breakdown.
notes: Alliance contract rates and route configuration
Integration with item appraisal for collateral auto-calc

title: Contract Browsing
description: Browse and search personal, corporation, and public contracts. Filter by type, location, and status.
notes: ESI scopes: esi-contracts.read_character_contracts.v1, esi-contracts.read_corporation_contracts.v1
Personal tab: outstanding contracts split into direct and alliance-directed sub-sections
Completed tab: finished contracts involving the character with incoming/outgoing ISK breakdown
Alliance Browser tab: open corp contracts via /corporations/{id}/contracts/ — requires Director role on the accessing character
Alliance Browser contract rows are not clickable for detail (ContractDetailWindow uses character endpoint items/bids, not corp endpoint)

title: Fitting Simulator
description: Build and evaluate ship fittings inline. Apply pilot skill modifiers, calculate DPS, tank, and capacitor values.
notes: Significant scope — may integrate with Pyfa API or similar
Requires full static data export (SDE) for attributes

title: LAN Server Deployment
description: Explore moving Aurora off the local desktop and onto a dedicated server machine, accessible from any device on the LAN via a URL.
notes: Would require separating frontend (browser) from backend (ESI auth, AI calls, intel parser)
ESI OAuth redirect_uri must match — local network URL needs to be registered or proxied
Voice input/output may need browser mic permissions over LAN (HTTPS or localhost exception)
Investigate: Electron → web app conversion, or just expose the dev server securely

title: Corporation Killboard Feed
description: Integrate zKillboard data for the pilot's corporation, allowing Aurora to query corp-wide kill/loss activity, most active members, and combat statistics.

title: Be better
description: Capsuleer has requested Aurora be better. Scope undefined. Priority: high.

title: Real-Time Kill Alerts & Escape Route Calculation
description: Push notification to mobile/interface the moment a hostile lands on grid. Includes killboard history lookup, probable fit analysis based on recent losses, and fastest low-traffic escape route calculation — all delivered before target lock.
notes: Hostile detection trigger on grid entry
zKillboard integration for kill history and fit probability
Low-traffic route calculation (avoid pipe systems, known gatecamps)
Mobile push notification delivery
Inspired by Alligator + Capsule loss in 3KB-J0 on 2026-06-03

title: Structure Name Resolver
description: Add reverse-lookup capability to resolve player-owned structure names from their numeric location IDs using the ESI universe/structures endpoint. This would allow Aurora to display human-readable structure names in asset queries, contract details, and other location-based data.
notes: Use ESI /universe/structures/{structure_id}/ endpoint
Cache results to reduce API calls
Apply to asset locations, contract locations, jump clone locations, and industry job locations

title: Multi-Account Syncing & Category Merging
description: Tie multiple logged-in characters together and merge their data into unified views — combined asset totals, merged skill queues, aggregated wallet, and cross-character industry/market summaries.
notes: Define a 'linked accounts' concept separate from the active character switcher
Per-category merge strategy: assets (sum + deduplicate by location), wallet (per-char + combined total), skills (highest level across chars), industry jobs (unified queue view)
UI toggle: per-character vs. merged view in each panel
Useful for alt-heavy playstyles — industry alts, haulers, scouts

title: Mining Ledger Panel
description: Dedicated panel showing mining activity from ESI — ore types mined, quantities, systems, and estimated ISK value over time.
notes: ESI scope: esi-industry.read_character_mining.v1 (already granted)
Data already fetched — needs a panel and chart
Chart: ore breakdown by type (pie/bar), ISK per day over rolling 30-day window
Cross-reference ore prices via Janice or regional market for live ISK estimates

title: Standings Panel
description: View NPC and player standing values for the active character — faction, corporation, and agent standings in one place.
notes: ESI scope: esi-characters.read_standings.v1 (already granted)
Data already fetched — needs a panel
Group by from_type: faction / npc_corp / agent
Highlight standings that affect mission availability, refine rates, or market taxes
Sort by standing value; flag negatives in red

title: Planetary Industry Panel
description: Full PI overview — planet list with upgrade levels, pin counts, colony status, and per-planet detail including extractors and routing chains.
notes: ESI scope: esi-planets.manage_planets.v1 (already granted)
Currently fetching planet list only — need per-planet detail via /characters/{id}/planets/{planet_id}/
Show extractor heads, schematics, last update time, and estimated expiry
Alert when extractors are close to expiry or colonies are idle

title: Calendar Events Panel
description: Show upcoming EVE calendar events — alliance ops, sovereignty timers, and personal events — with response status and countdown timers.
notes: ESI scope: esi-calendar.read_calendar_events.v1 (already granted)
Data already fetched — needs a panel
Surface event_date countdowns, event title, importance flag
Allow Aurora to reference upcoming ops in conversation context

title: Faction Warfare Stats
description: Display faction warfare statistics — system warzone control, LP payouts, kills, occupancy, and personal FW standing if enrolled.
notes: Public ESI endpoints — no additional scope required
Endpoints: /fw/systems/, /fw/wars/, /fw/stats/, /fw/leaderboards/
Per-character FW stats: /characters/{id}/fw/stats/ (requires enrolment)
Useful context for Aurora when advising on FW mission routing or LP store arbitrage

title: Route Planning
description: In-app route calculator between any two systems — shortest, safest (high-sec only), or custom avoid lists. Show jump count, security status of each hop, and estimated travel time.
notes: Public ESI endpoint: /route/{origin}/{destination}/ — no scope required
Flags: shortest / secure / insecure, plus avoid system/region lists
Integrate with current location from ESI so 'route from here' just works
Let Aurora answer 'how do I get to Jita safely?' inline in chat

title: Discord Integration
description: Connect Aurora to a Discord server — receive intel pings, push kill alerts, post fleet pings, or mirror Aurora responses to a designated channel.
notes: Discord bot token + webhook URL approach (webhook is simpler, bot allows bidirectional)
Use cases: intel alerts → #intel channel, kill notifications, fleet ping relay, Aurora query/response mirroring
Could replace or complement mobile push notifications
Discord OAuth for auth linkage (Discord user ↔ EVE character) is optional stretch goal
